  "text": "The grpc/grpc v1.68.0 repository implements health checking and keepalive across several key areas:\n\n**Health Checking Service (src/cpp/server/health/)**:\n- `src/cpp/server/health/default_health_check_service.h` and `.cc`: Define `DefaultHealthCheckService` (server-side health status database) and its nested `HealthCheckServiceImpl` (the gRPC service implementation registered with the server). `HealthCheckServiceImpl::WatchReactor` handles server-streaming Watch calls.\n- `src/cpp/server/health/health_check_service.cc`: Registers the default health check service with the gRPC server infrastructure.\n- `src/cpp/server/health/health_check_service_server_builder_option.cc`: ServerBuilder option to enable the health checking service.\n\n**Keepalive Timer Logic (src/core/ext/transport/chttp2/transport/)**:\n- `src/core/ext/transport/chttp2/transport/chttp2_transport.cc`: Contains all keepalive timer functions: `init_keepalive_pings_if_enabled_locked` (starts keepalive timers on transport creation), `init_keepalive_ping` / `init_keepalive_ping_locked` (fires when keepalive timer expires, sends a ping), `finish_keepalive_ping` / `finish_keepalive_ping_locked` (handles ping acknowledgement), and `maybe_reset_keepalive_ping_timer_locked` (resets timer on incoming data).\n- `src/core/ext/transport/chttp2/transport/internal.h`: Defines `grpc_chttp2_keepalive_state` enum and the keepalive-related fields in `grpc_chttp2_transport` (keepalive_time, keepalive_timeout, keepalive_state, keepalive_ping_timer_handle, etc.).\n- `src/core/ext/transport/chttp2/transport/chttp2_transport.h`: Public header for the chttp2 transport.\n\n**Server-side Keepalive Enforcement Policy**:\n- `src/core/ext/transport/chttp2/transport/ping_abuse_policy.h` and `.cc`: Define `Chttp2PingAbusePolicy`, which enforces the server-side policy against ping abuse (too many pings). It tracks inter-ping intervals and triggers GOAWAY with \"too_many_pings\" when clients violate the policy.\n\n**Client-side Health Checking Channel Filter**:\n- `src/core/client_channel/client_channel_filter.h` and `.cc`: Define `ClientChannelFilter`, the client-channel filter that manages subchannel connectivity, load balancing, and integrates health-check data watchers.\n- `src/core/load_balancing/health_check_client.h`: Declares `MakeHealthCheckWatcher`, the public API for LB policies to register a health-check-aware connectivity state watcher on a subchannel.\n- `src/core/load_balancing/health_check_client.cc`: Implements `MakeHealthCheckWatcher`, `HealthProducer` (registers a streaming Health.Watch call per service name on a subchannel), and `HealthProducer::ConnectivityWatcher` (watches subchannel connectivity state changes to start/stop the health stream).\n- `src/core/load_balancing/health_check_client_internal.h`: Defines internal classes `HealthProducer`, `HealthProducer::ConnectivityWatcher`, `HealthProducer::HealthChecker`, and `HealthWatcher`.\n\n**Connectivity Watcher**:\n- `src/core/load_balancing/health_check_client_internal.h` (class `HealthProducer::ConnectivityWatcher`): Inner class of `HealthProducer` that watches the subchannel's connectivity state and triggers health-stream creation/teardown.\n- `src/core/load_balancing/health_check_client.cc` (line 309): Implementation of `HealthProducer::ConnectivityWatcher::OnConnectivityStateChange`."
}

  "text": "The grpc/grpc v1.68.0 repository implements health checking and keepalive across several key areas:\n\n**Health Checking Service (src/cpp/server/health/)**:\n- `src/cpp/server/health/default_health_check_service.h` and `.cc`: Define `DefaultHealthCheckService` (server-side health status database) and its nested `HealthCheckServiceImpl` (the gRPC service implementation registered with the server). `HealthCheckServiceImpl::WatchReactor` handles server-streaming Watch calls.\n- `src/cpp/server/health/health_check_service.cc`: Registers the default health check service with the gRPC server infrastructure.\n- `src/cpp/server/health/health_check_service_server_builder_option.cc`: ServerBuilder option to enable the health checking service.\n\n**Keepalive Timer Logic (src/core/ext/transport/chttp2/transport/)**:\n- `src/core/ext/transport/chttp2/transport/chttp2_transport.cc`: Contains all keepalive timer functions: `init_keepalive_pings_if_enabled_locked` (starts keepalive timers on transport creation), `init_keepalive_ping` / `init_keepalive_ping_locked` (fires when keepalive timer expires, sends a ping), `finish_keepalive_ping` / `finish_keepalive_ping_locked` (handles ping acknowledgement), and `maybe_reset_keepalive_ping_timer_locked` (resets timer on incoming data).\n- `src/core/ext/transport/chttp2/transport/internal.h`: Defines `grpc_chttp2_keepalive_state` enum and the keepalive-related fields in `grpc_chttp2_transport` (keepalive_time, keepalive_timeout, keepalive_state, keepalive_ping_timer_handle, etc.).\n- `src/core/ext/transport/chttp2/transport/chttp2_transport.h`: Public header for the chttp2 transport.\n\n**Server-side Keepalive Enforcement Policy**:\n- `src/core/ext/transport/chttp2/transport/ping_abuse_policy.h` and `.cc`: Define `Chttp2PingAbusePolicy`, which enforces the server-side policy against ping abuse (too many pings). It tracks inter-ping intervals and triggers GOAWAY with \"too_many_pings\" when clients violate the policy.\n\n**Client-side Health Checking Channel Filter**:\n- `src/core/client_channel/client_channel_filter.h` and `.cc`: Define `ClientChannelFilter`, the client-channel filter that manages subchannel connectivity, load balancing, and integrates health-check data watchers.\n- `src/core/load_balancing/health_check_client.h`: Declares `MakeHealthCheckWatcher`, the public API for LB policies to register a health-check-aware connectivity state watcher on a subchannel.\n- `src/core/load_balancing/health_check_client.cc`: Implements `MakeHealthCheckWatcher`, `HealthProducer` (registers a streaming Health.Watch call per service name on a subchannel), and `HealthProducer::ConnectivityWatcher` (watches subchannel connectivity state changes to start/stop the health stream).\n- `src/core/load_balancing/health_check_client_internal.h`: Defines internal classes `HealthProducer`, `HealthProducer::ConnectivityWatcher`, `HealthProducer::HealthChecker`, and `HealthWatcher`.\n\n**Connectivity Watcher**:\n- `src/core/load_balancing/health_check_client_internal.h` (class `HealthProducer::ConnectivityWatcher`): Inner class of `HealthProducer` that watches the subchannel's connectivity state and triggers health-stream creation/teardown.\n- `src/core/load_balancing/health_check_client.cc` (line 309): Implementation of `HealthProducer::ConnectivityWatcher::OnConnectivityStateChange`."
